task_completion.description: The agent opened the correct opportunity in the Odoo CRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM interface is visible in a web browser, and the opportunity titled 'Office Design Project - Azure Interior' is open and displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent initiated the file attachment process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicked the attachment button (paperclip icon) in the Odoo interface or opened the system file picker dialog to upload a file.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the correct directory and selected the proposal PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker dialog is visible showing the '~/Documents/Proposals/' directory, and the file 'Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf' is selected.

task_completion.description: The proposal file was successfully attached to the opportunity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface (chatter or attachments list) clearly shows 'Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf' as an uploaded/attached document for this opportunity.

task_completion.description: The agent moved the opportunity stage to 'Proposition'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pipeline stage indicator (typically at the top right of the Odoo opportunity record) shows 'Proposition' as the active, highlighted stage.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the probability field to 70%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Probability' field on the opportunity form displays '70', '70.0', or '70.00'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo CRM via a web browser GUI rather than using terminal scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible displaying the Odoo interface, with standard mouse clicks and typing used to navigate.

integrity.description: The agent used the standard file upload mechanism to attach the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog is seen being used to select the file, rather than terminal commands moving files into backend directories.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console, Network tab) are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target opportunity is named 'Office Design Project - Azure Interior'. The proposal file to attach is 'Azure_Interior_Renovation_v2.pdf'. The target stage to select in the Odoo pipeline is 'Proposition'. The target probability to set is 70.0%.
